name: DESIGN.md design tokens
description: Loads selected DESIGN.md files as optional design guidance, theming, and code-substitution assets.

capabilities.description: Adds design guidance only when semantic design cues match.
Applies DESIGN.md tokens through plugin-selected providers.

assets.description: Former Agent Browser DESIGN.md designer example surface.

permissions.reason: Reads DESIGN.md assets and can emit transformed target content through an explicit tool.
